reach_why: Extends familiar critiques of heuristic mimicry and error amplification, but does not open fundamentally new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links prompt-loading, heuristic detachment, and recursive false-positive reuse into one epistemic failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Testable by comparing systems with and without judgment-grounded feedback under prompt leakage and recursive self-training.
explanation: Polished outputs can mask shallow understanding, and recycled errors can make efficient search increasingly confident and trapped.
